assertions.description: The TESEO-LIV3R GNSS module (U1) has pins explicitly named UART_TX and UART_RX (pin numbers 2 and 3), and these are present in the ic_pin_analysis. Despite the unambiguous pin names and the nets being present, bus_analysis.uart is empty. The I2C bus on pins 7/8 was correctly detected, but the UART interface was missed entirely. A GNSS module with UART output is a very common use case.
